pool.liquidity.name: pool.liquidity
pool.liquidity.description: Market depth of an AMM pool via the keyless GeckoTerminal (CoinGecko on-chain) API: rolling 24h swap volume (vol24hUsd) AND total value locked (reserveUsd, USD reserves). Backs lp-low-liquidity / lp-low-tvl / swap-into-thin-pool. Active by default; set GECKOTERMINAL_API_URL empty to disable.

venue.description: The pool venue (internally-tagged AmmVenue object); the subgraph pool key is read from .pool / .pool_id / .pair by variant. Present for add-liquidity and single-pool swaps; absent (dormant) for aggregator/multi-hop routes.

token.market_data.name: token.market_data
token.market_data.description: Valuation + liquidity for a token (a swap's OUTPUT/buy token) via the keyless GeckoTerminal token endpoint: fully-diluted valuation (fdvUsd) and total cross-pool liquidity (tokenLiquidityUsd). Backs swap-buy-microcap / swap-buy-thin-token. Complementary to token.security_flags (honeypot/tax) — valuation/liquidity signals, not contract-security ones. Active by default; set GECKOTERMINAL_API_URL empty to disable.

token.description: The swap's decoded output (buy) token address, 0x-hex.

token.security_flags.name: token.security_flags
token.security_flags.description: External token-security feed for a decoded ERC-20 token. Reports honeypot/malicious flags and optional buy/sell tax bps when the feed can answer.

token.normalize_to_nano.name: token.normalize_to_nano
token.normalize_to_nano.description: Normalize a token-native raw amount to 1e9 nano units using either literal decimals in the extension or server/global decimals when decimals are omitted.

decimals.description: Optional literal token decimals for local pure handling.

address.sanctions.name: address.sanctions
address.sanctions.description: Is an address on an on-chain sanctions oracle (Chainalysis isSanctioned — OFAC/EU/UN)? Legal-list membership, distinct from a scam/drainer heuristic. v1 screens Ethereum mainnet (the EigenLayer chain).

address.description: Address under review (delegation operator / newOperator / counterparty), 0x-hex.

address.reputation.name: address.reputation
address.reputation.description: External reputation feed for an address such as a recipient, spender, operator, or counterparty. Returns a fail-open scam/drainer heuristic, distinct from sanctions-list membership.

address.similarity.name: address.similarity
address.similarity.description: Compare a candidate recipient/counterparty against the wallet's recent outbound transfer set and report address-poisoning style similarity collisions.

candidate.description: Candidate address being sent to or approved, 0x-hex.

lending.health_factor.name: lending.health_factor
lending.health_factor.description: Projected post-action health factor of a lending position (Aave V3; Spark fork shares the ABI). Reads the borrower's on-chain account state and applies the pending borrow/withdraw delta — a CONSERVATIVE pre-sign estimate (HF < 1 ⇒ liquidatable), NOT a transaction simulation. v1 reads Ethereum mainnet only; any uncertainty omits the field so the policy stays dormant (never a fabricated HF).

venue.description: Lending venue — the LendingVenue object carries the Pool address inline.

amount.description: On-chain amount (uint256 hex string); uint256::MAX = withdraw-all.

action_kind.description: Direction of the action. Supplied by the manifest as a literal constant (the trigger already pins borrow vs withdraw), since the lowered Cedar context carries no tag field.

bridge.value_loss_pct.name: bridge.value_loss_pct
bridge.value_loss_pct.description: Implied bridge value loss: (inputUsd - outputUsd) / inputUsd * 100, using synced/global token prices for both legs. Omitted when either leg cannot be valued.

approval.allowance.name: approval.allowance
approval.allowance.description: Inspect a synced ERC-20 allowance for (chain, asset, spender): surfaces raw value, unlimited-allowance flag, and optional coverage of a requested amount.

requested_amount.description: Optional amount to compare against the synced allowance (uint256 string).

approval.cover_inputs.name: approval.cover_inputs
approval.cover_inputs.description: Whether the token allowance covers the requested input amount.

allowances_cover_inputs.description: Caller-supplied override; takes precedence when present.

requested_amount.description: Amount being requested by the transaction.

clock.now.name: clock.now
clock.now.description: Current Unix timestamp (seconds) from the daemon's clock.

intent.pending_cap_over_balance.name: intent.pending_cap_over_balance
intent.pending_cap_over_balance.description: Check whether already-open signed limit orders plus the new order commit more of the sell token than the wallet's synced balance.

intent.near_duplicate_pending.name: intent.near_duplicate_pending
intent.near_duplicate_pending.description: Detect whether a new signed intent order is a near duplicate of an already-open order by venue, sell token, and buy token.

intent.validity_horizon_sec.name: intent.validity_horizon_sec
intent.validity_horizon_sec.description: Seconds remaining until an intent order's validity deadline. Values below zero clamp to zero.

now.description: Unix timestamp override used by tests; omitted in production.

oracle.effective_rate_bps.name: oracle.effective_rate_bps
oracle.effective_rate_bps.description: Effective rate of a swap vs the oracle's mid-market price, expressed in basis points (negative = unfavourable).

oracle.usd_value.name: oracle.usd_value
oracle.usd_value.description: Convert a token amount to its USD valuation via a price oracle.

source.description: Legacy advisory source hint. The current authenticated /evaluate host prefers synced wallet/global server prices and may use a bounded host-configured Chainlink fallback for canonical tokens; callers do not supply arbitrary price-source URLs.

oracle.steth_peg_status_bps.name: oracle.steth_peg_status_bps
oracle.steth_peg_status_bps.description: Directional stETH/ETH peg status in basis points from market-global stETH and WETH prices. Returns discount, premium, absolute deviation, and peg ratio.

portfolio.balance.name: portfolio.balance
portfolio.balance.description: Wallet balance of a specific token.

portfolio.input_fraction_bps.name: portfolio.input_fraction_bps
portfolio.input_fraction_bps.description: Fraction of the wallet's portfolio (denominated in the input asset) the transaction is spending, in basis points.

marketplace.sign_order_proceeds_floor.name: marketplace.sign_order_proceeds_floor
marketplace.sign_order_proceeds_floor.description: Compare a signed Seaport order's proceeds paid to the offerer against the floor value of the NFT collection(s) offered.

marketplace.fulfill_overpay_vs_floor.name: marketplace.fulfill_overpay_vs_floor
marketplace.fulfill_overpay_vs_floor.description: Compare the taker's total paid consideration against the floor value of the NFT collection(s) received when fulfilling a Seaport order.

perp.equity_drawdown_bps.name: perp.equity_drawdown_bps
perp.equity_drawdown_bps.description: HyperLiquid account equity drawdown from day-start and high-water-mark anchors, measured in basis points over synced master-wallet state.

perp.session_fill_stats.name: perp.session_fill_stats
perp.session_fill_stats.description: HyperLiquid UTC-day fill-window aggregates: loss streak, losses today, trades today, and realized PnL today.

min_loss_usd.description: Minimum absolute closed PnL, in USD, for a losing close to count toward loss streak/count.

now.description: Unix timestamp override used by tests; omitted in production.

stat_window.snapshot.name: stat_window.snapshot
stat_window.snapshot.description: Rolling-window snapshot of recent outbound on-chain transfer activity for the wallet.
